definition: The right orientation of understanding that sees experience and practice in line with the path.
notes: The project keeps the familiar rendering right view here because it is already clear contemporary English and functions well across path, ethics, and insight contexts. The term should not be narrowed to mere belief or ideology. Ven. Dr. M. Punnaji uses harmonious perspective in his eightfold-way teaching materials; the repository records that as a source-specific pedagogical alternate.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose stressing appropriateness rather than dogma
context_rules.notes: Use sparingly if it clarifies the practical force.

context_rules.context: In Punnaji-style pedagogical exposition of the eightfold path
context_rules.notes: Source-backed alternate, not the house default.

example_phrases.notes: Helpful contrast showing the practical polarity of the term.
